posts.author: Kmk (kmk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, please consider let us use the feature View item and subitems by invitation, that mean we can have items with privacy that can be only vissible for who is invited.

I think this feature will help us reduce the creation of so many boards…but by now monday.com have it separed only for Enterprise users…but I have business plan, anyway why have this only for enterprise? let us using this feature will reduce server cost and all…

Good for you and good for us, why not?
